equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.bracer: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 50% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 10%, resulting in more damage over time.
equipmentMods.helmet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.boots: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 15 Damage for every 150 of your highest stat.
equipmentMods.ring2: Gain 15 Damage for every 150 of your highest stat.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 5% Damage for each available potion
equipmentMods.belt: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.
equipmentMods.bracer: When mining a node, it explodes causing a wave of Lightning damage to enemies around it. Gain a 5% Lightning Damage bonus for 60 seconds, stacks up to 20.
equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing an elite enemy will now have a 10% chance to spawn an Amadora Snail.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% Crit Chance per potion slot.
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 1.5% Damage for every 10 essence available.

equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 100% damage and a bonus +15% for every additional orb.
equipmentMods.goblet: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.

equipmentMods.amulet: Killing an elite grants you a Blessing that gives 1 maximum Energy. Lasts 20 seconds, and stacks up to 100.
equipmentMods.belt: Rain of Flames: Meteors now explode, gaining 85% more damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 1.5 seconds.
equipmentMods.helmet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Delusion of Zelkors: Spawn three additional mages.
equipmentMods.relic: While in Berserker Fury, gain 2% damage reduction each time you're hit. Upon reaching maximum damage reduction, gain +100 base damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages' explosions now spawn fire spikes, dealing an additional 20% damage for every active mage.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 5% movement speed per potion slot

equipmentMods.goblet: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages' explosions now spawn fire spikes, dealing an additional 20% damage for every active mage.
equipmentMods.horn: Delusion of Zelkors: Spawn three additional mages.
equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 1.5 seconds.

equipmentMods.goblet: Statische Aufladung: Erhalte Aufladungen, indem du Gegnern Schaden zufügst. Jede Ladung fügt 1 % Blitzschaden hinzu. Bei 100 Ladungen beschwörst du Blitze über dem Schlachtfeld.
equipmentMods.horn: Flammenregen: Wenn ein Meteor landet, erzeugt er einen Lavastrom, der Gegner kontinuierlich schädigt. Die Lava bleibt 0,5 Sekunden lang bestehen und verursacht den gleichen Schaden wie Flammenregen.
equipmentMods.trinket: Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +100%.
